AFFLICTION_FTUE_DESCRIPTION:
Enemies may impair your cards by applying afflictions to them.
A card may only have 1 affliction at a time. Afflictions wear off at the end of combat.
CANNOT_PLAY_CARD_FTUE_DESCRIPTION:
Cards cannot be played if you don't have enough Energy.

End your turn to replenish your Energy and draw new cards.
CANNOT_PLAY_CARD_FTUE_TITLE: Tip: You can't play this card!
CAN_PLAY_CARDS_FTUE_DESCRIPTION:
This is the [gold]Energy Indicator[/gold].

Example: [blue]2/3[/blue] means you have [blue]2[/blue] energy remaining for this turn and that it will replenish to [blue]3[/blue] at the start of your next turn.
CAN_PLAY_CARDS_FTUE_TITLE: Tip: You can still play cards!
CHEST_FTUE_DESCRIPTION: Sometimes you may enter a room with a chest or a character. Be sure to interact with them before moving on.
ENCHANTMENT_FTUE_DESCRIPTION:
Enchantments permanently improve the card they are on.
A card may only have 1 enchantment at a time.
MAP_SELECT_DESCRIPTION: To move up in the Spire, pick a room to enter. Once you complete the room, pick an adjacent room above to keep climbing.
MAP_SELECT_TITLE: Tip: Select a Room to travel to
MERCHANT_FTUE_DESCRIPTION:
Be sure to interact with the [blue]Merchant[/blue] before heading to the next room.

“Hello! Spend your [gold]Gold[/gold] here!!”
POTION_FTUE_DESCRIPTION:
Drink or throw potions during combat!
Potions stay with you throughout the run.
POWER_FTUE_DESCRIPTION: Power cards apply a buff to you when used. Buffs remain for the duration of a single combat.
RELIC_FTUE_DESCRIPTION:
Relics found throughout the Spire grant unique bonuses and remain throughout your run.

They can be found at [gold]Treasure Rooms[/gold], random [blue]Events[/blue], or by defeating [red]Elites[/red].
REST_SITE_FTUE_DESCRIPTION:
At a rest site, you can stop and take a breather.

After selecting one of the options, you must move on. Choose wisely!
REWARDS_FTUE_DESCRIPTION: After combat, be sure to pick up your Gold, Cards, and other items before moving on.
SHUFFLE_FTUE_DESCRIPTION: If there are no cards to draw, your [b]Discard Pile[/b] (right) is shuffled into your [b]Draw Pile[/b] (left).
TUTORIAL_FTUE_BODY_1:
Defeat enemies by playing cards from your hand!

Cards require [gold]Energy[/gold] to play.
Once you are out, end your turn.

At the start of your turn, new cards are drawn and your [gold]Energy[/gold] is replenished.
TUTORIAL_FTUE_BODY_2:
Play defensive cards to gain [gold]Block[/gold] when enemies are about to attack you.

[gold]Block[/gold] reduces incoming attack damage but [red]wears off[/red] at the start of your next turn.
TUTORIAL_FTUE_BODY_3:
During your turn, you can observe an enemy's [gold]Intent[/gold] above them. 

If an enemy is intent on attacking you, be sure to [gold]Block[/gold]!
